name: Raspberry Queen of Puddings (Marguerite Patten)
recipeIngredient: 0.5 ounce Caster or soft brown sugar
3 ounces Fine brown or white breadcrumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the finely grated lemon rind and milk until well combined.
2. Add the butter or margarine and whisk until melted and fully incorporated.
3. Stir in the caster or soft brown sugar until dissolved.
4. Fold in the breadcrumbs until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
5. Beat the eggs in a separate bowl, then stir them into the breadcrumb mixture.
6. Gently fold in the raspberry jam until well combined.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and place it in the center of a preheated oven.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until set and golden brown on top.
9. Turn off the heat, remove from the oven, and allow to cool slightly before serving.
